ops.action: Update core logic and tests together: core/lifecycle invariants in `tests/test_pack_lifecycle.py`, user-facing contract in `tests/test_pack_cli_ux.py`; ensure failures are informative (actionable error messages) and consistent with expected exit codes.
ops.title: Treat Pack UX + Core As One Contract
ops.trigger: When making a pack behavior change that has both a core and CLI surface area

ops.action: Add/adjust lifecycle tests to lock in invariants (happy path + edge cases) in `tests/test_pack_lifecycle.py`; make tests assert durable behaviors (state transitions, idempotency, cleanup, and failure modes) rather than incidental implementation details; run `uv run ruff check .`, `uv run basedpyright`, then `uv run pytest`.
ops.title: Pack Changes Need Lifecycle Coverage
ops.trigger: When you modify pack core behavior (selection, creation, install/activate, lifecycle/cleanup) or touch `src/agent_loom/pack/core.py`

ops.action: Add/update focused CLI UX tests in `tests/test_pack_cli_ux.py` that assert exit code and a few key stdout/stderr substrings; avoid brittle full-output snapshots; keep assertions resilient to formatting/ordering changes while still protecting the user contract.
ops.title: Lock Pack CLI UX With Low-Noise Tests
ops.trigger: When you change pack-related CLI commands (flags, help text, user-visible messaging, exit codes) or add new pack UX behavior
